title: spirotecoma woodfredensis
side_effects: Spirotecoma woodfredensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of alkaloids. Prolonged use or excessive dosage can lead to more severe side effects, including vomiting, diarrhea, and even respiratory problems. In rare cases, improper use of Spirotecoma woodfredensis can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, hives, or anaphylaxis. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant to avoid any potential health risks.
